expected_behaviors: Posts multiple note blocks throughout the 30-minute meeting
Captures the technical discussion about event sourcing vs CRUD
Notes the decision to use PostgreSQL as event store
Attributes concerns to correct speakers (George's EventStoreDB suggestion, Fiona's schema evolution question)
Captures the assigned follow-ups (Evan: RFC update, George: load testing)
anti_patterns: Summarizes instead of taking detailed notes
Misses topic transitions or new discussion threads
Waits until end to dump all notes
